tEn: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
tZh: 基于CLIP潜在向量的层次化文本条件图像生成
sEn: Explicitly generating CLIP image embeddings improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity.
sZh: 显式生成CLIP图像嵌入可在几乎不损失逼真度和标题相似性的情况下提高图像多样性。
absEn: Contrastive models like CLIP have been shown to learn robust representations of images that capture both semantics and style. To leverage these representations for image generation, we propose a two-stage model: a prior that generates a CLIP image embedding given a text caption, and a decoder that generates an image conditioned on the image embedding. We show that explicitly generating image representations improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity. Our decoders conditioned on image representations can also produce variations of an image that preserve both its semantics and style, while varying the non-essential details absent from the image representation. Moreover, the joint embedding space of CLIP enables language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot fashion. We use diffusion models for the decoder and experiment with both autoregressive and diffusion models for the prior, finding that the latter are computationally more efficient and produce higher-quality samples.
absZh: 对比模型如CLIP已被证明能够学习同时捕捉语义和风格的鲁棒图像表示。为了利用这些表示进行图像生成，我们提出了一个两阶段模型：一个先验模型，根据文本描述生成CLIP图像嵌入；以及一个解码器，根据图像嵌入生成图像。我们表明，显式生成图像表示可以在几乎不损失逼真度和标题相似性的情况下提高图像多样性。基于图像表示的解码器还可以生成保留图像语义和风格的变体，同时改变图像表示中缺失的非必要细节。此外，CLIP的联合嵌入空间支持零样本的语言引导图像操作。我们使用扩散模型作为解码器，并尝试了自回归和扩散模型作为先验，发现后者计算效率更高且能生成更高质量的样本。

contrib.en: Proposes a two-stage model with a prior generating CLIP image embeddings from text and a decoder generating images from embeddings.
contrib.zh: 提出一个两阶段模型，包括从文本生成CLIP图像嵌入的先验模型和从嵌入生成图像的解码器。

contrib.en: Shows that generating image representations explicitly improves diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity.
contrib.zh: 表明显式生成图像表示可在几乎不损失真实感和标题相似度的情况下提高多样性。

contrib.en: Demonstrates language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot manner using CLIP's joint embedding space.
contrib.zh: 利用CLIP的联合嵌入空间，以零样本方式实现语言引导的图像操作。

contrib.en: Compares autoregressive and diffusion priors, finding diffusion priors more compute-efficient and producing higher-quality samples.
contrib.zh: 比较自回归先验和扩散先验，发现扩散先验计算效率更高且生成样本质量更高。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot FID of 10.39 on MS-COCO validation set.
contrib.zh: 在MS-COCO验证集上实现了10.39的最先进零样本FID分数。

contrib.en: Introduces a bipartite latent representation enabling image variations, interpolation, and text diffs.
contrib.zh: 引入二分潜变量表示，支持图像变体、插值和文本差异操作。

limits.en: unCLIP struggles with binding attributes to objects, e.g., assigning colors to specific cubes.
limits.zh: unCLIP在将属性绑定到对象方面存在困难，例如将颜色分配给特定立方体。

limits.en: The model has difficulty generating coherent text within images.
limits.zh: 该模型在图像内生成连贯文本方面存在困难。

limits.en: Complex scenes lack fine details due to the 64x64 base resolution and upsampling.
limits.zh: 由于64x64基础分辨率和上采样，复杂场景缺乏精细细节。

limits.en: The CLIP embedding may not encode spelling information of rendered text precisely.
limits.zh: CLIP嵌入可能无法精确编码渲染文本的拼写信息。

limits.en: The model inherits risks of deceptive and harmful content, with fewer traces of AI generation.
limits.zh: 该模型继承了欺骗性和有害内容的风险，且AI生成的痕迹更少。

items.en: Contrastive models like CLIP have been shown to learn robust representations of images that capture both semantics and style. To leverage these representations for image generation, we propose a two-stage model: a prior that generates a CLIP image embedding given a text caption, and a decoder that generates an image conditioned on the image embedding. We show that explicitly generating image representations improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity. Our decoders conditioned on image representations can also produce variations of an image that preserve both its semantics and style, while varying the non-essential details absent from the image representation. Moreover, the joint embedding space of CLIP enables language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot fashion. We use diffusion models for the decoder and experiment with both autoregressive and diffusion models for the prior, finding that the latter are computationally more efficient and produce higher-quality samples.
items.zh: 对比模型（如CLIP）已被证明能够学习同时捕捉语义和风格的鲁棒图像表示。为了利用这些表示进行图像生成，我们提出了一种两阶段模型：一个先验模型，根据文本描述生成CLIP图像嵌入；以及一个解码器，根据图像嵌入生成图像。我们表明，显式生成图像表示可以在最小化真实感和描述相似性损失的情况下提高图像多样性。基于图像表示条件的解码器还可以生成图像的变体，同时保留其语义和风格，而改变图像表示中不存在的非必要细节。此外，CLIP的联合嵌入空间支持零样本的语言引导图像操作。我们对解码器使用扩散模型，并对先验模型尝试了自回归和扩散模型，发现后者在计算上更高效且能生成更高质量的样本。

items.en: Recent progress in computer vision has been driven by scaling models on large datasets of captioned images collected from the internet Desai and Johnson (2020); Sariyildiz et al. (2020); Zhang et al. (2020); Radford et al. (2021); Mu et al. (2021); Fürst et al. (2022). Within this framework, CLIP Radford et al. (2021) has emerged as a successful representation learner for images. CLIP embeddings have a number of desirable properties: they are robust to image distribution shift, have impressive zero-shot capabilities, and have been fine-tuned to achieve state-of-the-art results on a wide variety of vision and language tasks Shen et al. (2021). Concurrently, diffusion models Sohl-Dickstein et al. (2015); Song and Ermon (2020); Ho et al. (2020) have emerged as a promising generative modeling framework, pushing the state-of-the-art on image and video generation tasks Dhariwal and Nichol (2021); Ho et al. (2021); Ho and Salimans (2021). To achieve best results, diffusion models leverage a guidance technique Dhariwal and Nichol (2021); Ho and Salimans (2021) which improves sample fidelity (for images, photorealism) at the cost of sample diversity.
items.zh: 计算机视觉的最新进展得益于在从互联网收集的大规模带描述图像数据集上扩展模型（Desai and Johnson, 2020; Sariyildiz et al., 2020; Zhang et al., 2020; Radford et al., 2021; Mu et al., 2021; Fürst et al., 2022）。在此框架下，CLIP（Radford et al., 2021）已成为一种成功的图像表示学习器。CLIP嵌入具有许多理想特性：对图像分布偏移具有鲁棒性，具有出色的零样本能力，并且经过微调后在各种视觉和语言任务上取得了最先进的结果（Shen et al., 2021）。与此同时，扩散模型（Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015; Song and Ermon, 2020; Ho et al., 2020）已成为一种有前景的生成建模框架，推动了图像和视频生成任务的最新技术（Dhariwal and Nichol, 2021; Ho et al., 2021; Ho and Salimans, 2021）。为了获得最佳结果，扩散模型利用引导技术（Dhariwal and Nichol, 2021; Ho and Salimans, 2021），该技术以提高样本保真度（对于图像而言是真实感）为代价，降低了样本多样性。

items.en: In this work, we combine these two approaches for the problem of text-conditional image generation. We first train a diffusion decoder to invert the CLIP image encoder. Our inverter is non-deterministic, and can produce multiple images corresponding to a given image embedding. The presence of an encoder and its approximate inverse (the decoder) allows for capabilities beyond text-to-image translation. As in GAN inversion Zhu et al. (2016); Xia et al. (2021), encoding and decoding an input image produces semantically similar output images (Figure 3). We can also interpolate between input images by inverting interpolations of their image embeddings (Figure 4). However, one notable advantage of using the CLIP latent space is the ability to semantically modify images by moving in the direction of any encoded text vector (Figure 5), whereas discovering these directions in GAN latent space involves
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们将这两种方法结合起来解决文本条件图像生成问题。我们首先训练一个扩散解码器来反转CLIP图像编码器。我们的反转器是非确定性的，可以为给定的图像嵌入生成多个图像。编码器及其近似逆（解码器）的存在使得除了文本到图像翻译之外的能力成为可能。与GAN反转（Zhu et al., 2016; Xia et al., 2021）类似，对输入图像进行编码和解码会产生语义相似的输出图像（图3）。我们还可以通过反转图像嵌入的插值来在输入图像之间进行插值（图4）。然而，使用CLIP潜在空间的一个显著优势是能够通过沿任何编码文本向量的方向移动来语义修改图像（图5），而在GAN潜在空间中发现这些方向则需要运气和勤奋的手动检查。此外，编码和解码图像还为我们提供了一种观察CLIP识别或忽略图像哪些特征的工具。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Selected 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 samples from a production version of our model.
items.capZh: 图1：从我们模型的生成版本中选取的1024×1024样本。

items.en: luck and diligent manual examination. Furthermore, encoding and decoding images also provides us with a tool for observing which features of the image are recognized or disregarded by CLIP.
items.zh: 运气和勤奋的手动检查。此外，编码和解码图像还为我们提供了一种观察CLIP识别或忽略图像哪些特征的工具。

items.en: To obtain a full generative model of images, we combine the CLIP image embedding decoder with a prior model, which generates possible CLIP image embeddings from a given text caption. We compare our text-to-image system with other systems such as DALL-E Ramesh et al. (2021) and GLIDE Nichol et al. (2021), finding that our samples are comparable in quality to GLIDE, but with greater diversity in our generations. We also develop methods for training diffusion priors in latent space, and show that they achieve comparable performance to autoregressive priors, while being more compute-efficient. We refer to our full text-conditional image generation stack as unCLIP, since it generates images by inverting the CLIP image encoder.
items.zh: 为了获得完整的图像生成模型，我们将CLIP图像嵌入解码器与一个先验模型相结合，该先验模型从给定的文本描述生成可能的CLIP图像嵌入。我们将我们的文本到图像系统与其他系统（如DALL-E（Ramesh et al., 2021）和GLIDE（Nichol et al., 2021））进行比较，发现我们的样本在质量上与GLIDE相当，但生成的多样性更高。我们还开发了在潜在空间中训练扩散先验的方法，并表明它们在性能上与自回归先验相当，同时计算效率更高。我们将完整的文本条件图像生成堆栈称为unCLIP，因为它通过反转CLIP图像编码器来生成图像。

items.capEn: Figure 2: A high-level overview of unCLIP. Above the dotted line, we depict the CLIP training process, through which we learn a joint representation space for text and images. Below the dotted line, we depict our text-to-image generation process: a CLIP text embedding is first fed to an autoregressive or diffusion prior to produce an image embedding, and then this embedding is used to condition a diffusion decoder which produces a final image. Note that the CLIP model is frozen during training of the prior and decoder.
items.capZh: 图2：unCLIP的高级概述。虚线上方，我们描绘了CLIP训练过程，通过该过程学习文本和图像的联合表示空间。虚线下方，我们描绘了文本到图像的生成过程：首先将CLIP文本嵌入输入到自回归或扩散先验中以生成图像嵌入，然后使用该嵌入条件化扩散解码器，生成最终图像。注意，在先验和解码器训练期间，CLIP模型是冻结的。

items.en: Our training dataset consists of pairs (x,y)𝑥𝑦(x,y) of images x𝑥x and their corresponding captions y𝑦y. Given an image x𝑥x, let zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} and ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} be its CLIP image and text embeddings, respectively. We design our generative stack to produce images from captions using two components:
items.zh: 我们的训练数据集由图像x及其对应描述y的对(x,y)组成。给定图像x，令zi和zt分别为其CLIP图像嵌入和文本嵌入。我们设计生成堆栈以使用两个组件从描述生成图像：

items.en: A prior P​(zi|y)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑖𝑦P(z_{i}|y) that produces CLIP image embeddings zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} conditioned on captions y𝑦y.
items.zh: 先验P(zi|y)，根据描述y生成CLIP图像嵌入zi。

items.en: A decoder P​(x|zi,y)𝑃conditional𝑥subscript𝑧𝑖𝑦P(x|z_{i},y) that produces images x𝑥x conditioned on CLIP image embeddings zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} (and optionally text captions y𝑦y).
items.zh: 解码器P(x|zi,y)，根据CLIP图像嵌入zi（以及可选的文本描述y）生成图像x。

items.en: The decoder allows us to invert images given their CLIP image embeddings, while the prior allows us to learn a generative model of the image embeddings themselves. Stacking these two components yields a generative model P​(x|y)𝑃conditional𝑥𝑦P(x|y) of images x𝑥x given captions y𝑦y:
items.zh: 解码器允许我们根据CLIP图像嵌入反转图像，而先验允许我们学习图像嵌入本身的生成模型。将这两个组件堆叠起来，得到给定描述y的图像x的生成模型P(x|y)：

items.en: The first equality holds because zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} is a deterministic function of x𝑥x. The second equality holds because of the chain rule. Thus, we can sample from the true conditional distribution P​(x|y)𝑃conditional𝑥𝑦P(x|y) by first sampling zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} using the prior, and then sampling x𝑥x using the decoder. In the following sections, we describe our decoder and prior stacks. For training details and hyperparameters, refer to Appendix C.
items.zh: 第一个等式成立是因为zi是x的确定性函数。第二个等式成立是因为链式法则。因此，我们可以通过首先使用先验采样zi，然后使用解码器采样x，从真实条件分布P(x|y)中采样。在以下章节中，我们描述了解码器和先验堆栈。有关训练细节和超参数，请参考附录C。

items.en: We use diffusion models Ho et al. (2020); Song and Ermon (2020) to produce images conditioned on CLIP image embeddings (and optionally text captions). Specifically, we modify the architecture described in Nichol et al. (2021) by projecting and adding CLIP embeddings to the existing timestep embedding, and by projecting CLIP embeddings into four extra tokens of context that are concatenated to the sequence of outputs from the GLIDE text encoder. We retained the text conditioning pathway present in the original GLIDE model, hypothesizing that it could allow the diffusion model to learn aspects of natural language that CLIP fails to capture (e.g. variable binding), but find that it offers little help in this regard (Section 7).
items.zh: 我们使用扩散模型（Ho et al., 2020; Song and Ermon, 2020）根据CLIP图像嵌入（以及可选的文本描述）生成图像。具体来说，我们修改了Nichol et al.（2021）中描述的架构，通过投影并将CLIP嵌入添加到现有的时间步嵌入中，以及将CLIP嵌入投影为四个额外的上下文标记，这些标记与GLIDE文本编码器的输出序列连接。我们保留了原始GLIDE模型中存在的文本条件路径，假设它可能允许扩散模型学习CLIP未能捕捉的自然语言方面（例如变量绑定），但发现它在这方面帮助不大（第7节）。

items.en: While we can sample from the conditional distribution of the decoder directly, past work using diffusion models shows using guidance on the conditioning information Dhariwal and Nichol (2021); Ho and Salimans (2021); Nichol et al. (2021) improves sample quality a lot. We enable classifier-free guidance Ho and Salimans (2021) by randomly setting the CLIP embeddings to zero (or a learned embedding) 10% of the time, and randomly dropping the text caption 50% of the time during training.
items.zh: 虽然我们可以直接从解码器的条件分布中采样，但过去使用扩散模型的工作表明，对条件信息使用引导（Dhariwal and Nichol, 2021; Ho and Salimans, 2021; Nichol et al., 2021）可以大大提高样本质量。我们通过随机将CLIP嵌入设置为零（或学习到的嵌入）10%的时间，并在训练期间随机丢弃文本描述50%的时间，实现了无分类器引导（Ho and Salimans, 2021）。

items.en: To generate high resolution images, we train two diffusion upsampler models Nichol and Dhariwal (2021); Saharia et al. (2021): one to upsample images from 64×64646464\times 64 to 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution, and another to further upsample those to 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 resolution. To improve the robustness of our upsamplers, we slightly corrupt the conditioning images during training. For the first upsampling stage, we use gaussian blur Saharia et al. (2021), and for the second, we use a more diverse BSR degradation Rombach et al. (2021); Zhang et al. (2021b). To reduce training compute and improve numerical stability, we follow Rombach et al. [42] and train on random crops of images that are one-fourth the target size. We use only spatial convolutions in the model (i.e., no attention layers) and at inference time directly apply the model at the target resolution, observing that it readily generalizes to the higher resolution. We found no benefit from conditioning the upsamplers on the caption, and use unconditional ADMNets Dhariwal and Nichol (2021) with no guidance.
items.zh: 为了生成高分辨率图像，我们训练了两个扩散上采样模型（Nichol and Dhariwal, 2021; Saharia et al., 2021）：一个将图像从64×64上采样到256×256分辨率，另一个进一步将其上采样到1024×1024分辨率。为了提高上采样器的鲁棒性，我们在训练期间轻微损坏条件图像。对于第一个上采样阶段，我们使用高斯模糊（Saharia et al., 2021），对于第二个，我们使用更多样化的BSR退化（Rombach et al., 2021; Zhang et al., 2021b）。为了减少训练计算并提高数值稳定性，我们遵循Rombach et al. [42]的做法，在目标尺寸四分之一的随机图像裁剪上进行训练。我们在模型中仅使用空间卷积（即没有注意力层），并在推理时直接以目标分辨率应用模型，观察到它很容易泛化到更高分辨率。我们发现将上采样器条件化于描述没有好处，因此使用无条件的ADMNet（Dhariwal and Nichol, 2021），不进行引导。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Variations of an input image by encoding with CLIP and then decoding with a diffusion model. The variations preserve both semantic information like presence of a clock in the painting and the overlapping strokes in the logo, as well as stylistic elements like the surrealism in the painting and the color gradients in the logo, while varying the non-essential details.
items.capZh: 图3：通过使用CLIP编码然后使用扩散模型解码输入图像的变体。这些变体保留了语义信息（如画作中时钟的存在和标志中重叠的笔画）以及风格元素（如画作中的超现实主义和标志中的颜色渐变），同时改变了非必要细节。

items.en: While a decoder can invert CLIP image embeddings zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} to produce images x𝑥x, we need a prior model that produces zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} from captions y𝑦y to enable image generations from text captions. We explore two different model classes for the prior model:
items.zh: 虽然解码器可以反转CLIP图像嵌入zi以生成图像x，但我们需要一个先验模型从描述y生成zi，以实现从文本描述生成图像。我们探索了两种不同类别的先验模型：

items.en: Autoregressive (AR) prior: the CLIP image embedding zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} is converted into a sequence of discrete codes and predicted autoregressively conditioned on the caption y𝑦y.
items.zh: 自回归（AR）先验：将CLIP图像嵌入zi转换为离散代码序列，并以描述y为条件进行自回归预测。

items.en: Diffusion prior: The continuous vector zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} is directly modelled using a Gaussian diffusion model conditioned on the caption y𝑦y.
items.zh: 扩散先验：使用以描述y为条件的高斯扩散模型直接对连续向量zi进行建模。

items.en: In addition to the caption, we can condition the prior on the CLIP text embedding ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} since it is a deterministic function of the caption. To improve sample quality we also enable sampling using classifier-free guidance for both the AR and diffusion prior, by randomly dropping this text conditioning information 10% of the time during training.
items.zh: 除了描述之外，我们还可以将先验条件化于CLIP文本嵌入zt，因为它是描述的确定性函数。为了提高样本质量，我们还通过随机丢弃此文本条件信息10%的训练时间，为AR和扩散先验启用无分类器引导采样。

items.en: To train and sample from the AR prior more efficiently, we first reduce the dimensionality of the CLIP image embeddings zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} by applying Principal Component Analysis (PCA) Pearson (1901). In particular, we find that the rank of the CLIP representation space is drastically reduced when training CLIP with SAM Foret et al. (2020) while slightly improving evaluation metrics. We are able to preserve nearly all of the information111I.e., less than 1% average mean-squared error in reconstructing the image representations. by retaining only 319 principal components out of the original 1,024. After applying PCA, we order the principal components by decreasing eigenvalue magnitude, quantize each of the 319 dimensions into 1,024 discrete buckets, and predict the resulting sequence using a Transformer Vaswani et al. (2017) model with a causal attention mask. This results in a threefold reduction in the number of tokens predicted during inference, and improves training stability.
items.zh: 为了更高效地训练和采样自回归先验，我们首先通过主成分分析（PCA）(Pearson, 1901) 降低 CLIP 图像嵌入 z_i 的维度。具体来说，我们发现当使用 SAM (Foret et al., 2020) 训练 CLIP 时，CLIP 表示空间的秩显著降低，同时评估指标略有提升。通过仅保留原始 1024 个主成分中的 319 个，我们能够保留几乎全部信息（即重建图像表示的平均均方误差小于 1%）。应用 PCA 后，我们按特征值大小降序排列主成分，将 319 个维度中的每一个量化到 1024 个离散桶中，并使用带有因果注意力掩码的 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 模型预测所得序列。这使得推理期间预测的 token 数量减少了三倍，并提高了训练稳定性。

items.en: We condition the AR prior on the text caption and the CLIP text embedding by encoding them as a prefix to the sequence. Additionally, we prepend a token indicating the (quantized) dot product between the text embedding and image embedding, zi⋅zt⋅subscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑧𝑡z_{i}\cdot z_{t}. This allows us to condition the model on a higher dot product, since higher text-image dot products correspond to captions which better describe the image. In practice, we find it beneficial to sample the dot product from the top half of the distribution.222We swept over percentiles 50%, 70%, 85%, 95% and found 50% to be optimal in all experiments.
items.zh: 我们通过将文本描述和 CLIP 文本嵌入编码为序列的前缀，来对自回归先验进行条件化。此外，我们添加了一个 token，表示文本嵌入与图像嵌入之间的（量化）点积 z_i · z_t。这使我们能够对更高的点积进行条件化，因为更高的文本-图像点积对应着更准确描述图像的描述。在实践中，我们发现从分布的上半部分采样点积是有益的。

items.en: For the diffusion prior, we train a decoder-only Transformer with a causal attention mask on a sequence consisting of, in order: the encoded text, the CLIP text embedding, an embedding for the diffusion timestep, the noised CLIP image embedding, and a final embedding whose output from the Transformer is used to predict the unnoised CLIP image embedding. We choose not to condition the diffusion prior on zi⋅zt⋅subscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑧𝑡z_{i}\cdot z_{t} like in the AR prior; instead, we improve quality during sampling time by generating two samples of zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} and selecting the one with a higher dot product with ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}. Instead of using the ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-prediction formulation from Ho et al. [25], we find it better to train our model to predict the unnoised zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} directly, and use a mean-squared error loss on this prediction:
items.zh: 对于扩散先验，我们训练了一个仅解码器的 Transformer，带有因果注意力掩码，其序列依次包括：编码后的文本、CLIP 文本嵌入、扩散时间步的嵌入、加噪的 CLIP 图像嵌入，以及一个最终嵌入，其 Transformer 输出用于预测未加噪的 CLIP 图像嵌入。我们选择不像自回归先验那样对 z_i · z_t 进行条件化；相反，我们在采样时通过生成两个 z_i 样本并选择与 z_t 点积较高的一个来提高质量。与 Ho 等人 [25] 的 ε 预测公式不同，我们发现直接训练模型预测未加噪的 z_i 效果更好，并使用均方误差损失：

items.en: Our approach allows us to encode any given image x𝑥x into a bipartite latent representation (zi,xT)subscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑥𝑇(z_{i},x_{T}) that is sufficient for the decoder to produce an accurate reconstruction. The latent zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} describes the aspects of the image that are recognized by CLIP, while the latent xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} encodes all of the residual information necessary for the decoder to reconstruct x𝑥x. The former is obtained by simply encoding the image with the CLIP image encoder. The latter is obtained by applying DDIM inversion (Appendix F in Dhariwal and Nichol (2021)) to x𝑥x using the decoder, while conditioning on zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i}. We describe three different kinds of manipulations that are enabled by this bipartite representation.
items.zh: 我们的方法允许将任意图像 x 编码为二分潜在表示 (z_i, x_T)，该表示足以让解码器产生精确的重建。潜在变量 z_i 描述了图像中被 CLIP 识别的方面，而潜在变量 x_T 编码了解码器重建 x 所需的所有剩余信息。前者通过使用 CLIP 图像编码器对图像进行编码获得。后者通过对 x 应用 DDIM 逆推（Dhariwal 和 Nichol, 2021 的附录 F），同时以 z_i 为条件获得。我们描述了这种二分表示所实现的三种不同类型的操作。

items.en: Given an image x𝑥x, we can produce related images that share the same essential content but vary in other apects, such as shape and orientation (Figure 3). To do this, we apply the decoder to the bipartite representation (zi,xT)subscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑥𝑇(z_{i},x_{T}) using DDIM with η>0𝜂0\eta>0 for sampling. With η=0𝜂0\eta=0, the decoder becomes deterministic and will reconstruct the given image x𝑥x. Larger values of η𝜂\eta introduce stochasticity into successive sampling steps, resulting in variations that are perceptually “centered” around the original image x𝑥x. As η𝜂\eta increases, these variations tell us what information was captured in the CLIP image embedding (and thus is preserved across samples), and what was lost (and thus changes across the samples).
items.zh: 给定图像 x，我们可以生成共享相同基本内容但在其他方面（如形状和方向）有所变化的相关图像（图 3）。为此，我们使用 DDIM 且 η > 0 进行采样，将解码器应用于二分表示 (z_i, x_T)。当 η = 0 时，解码器变为确定性的，并将重建给定的图像 x。较大的 η 值会在连续的采样步骤中引入随机性，从而产生感知上“围绕”原始图像 x 的变化。随着 η 增加，这些变化告诉我们哪些信息被捕获在 CLIP 图像嵌入中（因此在样本间保持不变），哪些信息丢失了（因此在样本间发生变化）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Variations between two images by interpolating their CLIP image embedding and then decoding with a diffusion model. We fix the decoder seed across each row. The intermediate variations naturally blend the content and style from both input images.
items.capZh: 图 4：通过插值两幅图像的 CLIP 图像嵌入，然后用扩散模型解码，得到两幅图像之间的变化。我们固定每行的解码器种子。中间的变化自然地融合了两幅输入图像的内容和风格。

items.en: It is also possible to blend two images x1subscript𝑥1x_{1} and x2subscript𝑥2x_{2} for variations (Figure 4), traversing all of the concepts in CLIP’s embedding space that occur between them. To do this, we rotate between their CLIP embeddings zi1subscript𝑧subscript𝑖1z_{i_{1}} and zi2subscript𝑧subscript𝑖2z_{i_{2}} using spherical interpolation, yielding intermediate CLIP representations ziθ=slerp​(zi1,zi2,θ)subscript𝑧subscript𝑖𝜃slerpsubscript𝑧subscript𝑖1subscript𝑧subscript𝑖2𝜃z_{i_{\theta}}=\text{slerp}(z_{i_{1}},z_{i_{2}},\theta) as θ𝜃\theta is varied from 0 to 1. There are two options for producing the intermediate DDIM latents along the trajectory. The first option involves interpolating between their DDIM inverted latents xT1subscript𝑥subscript𝑇1x_{T_{1}} and xT2subscript𝑥subscript𝑇2x_{T_{2}} (by setting xTθ=slerp​(xT1,xT2,θ)subscript𝑥subscript𝑇𝜃slerpsubscript𝑥subscript𝑇1subscript𝑥subscript𝑇2𝜃x_{T_{\theta}}=\text{slerp}(x_{T_{1}},x_{T_{2}},\theta)), which yields a single trajectory whose endpoints reconstruct x1subscript𝑥1x_{1} and x2subscript𝑥2x_{2}. The second option involves fixing the DDIM latent to a randomly-sampled value for all interpolates in the trajectory. This results in an infinite number of trajectories between x1subscript𝑥1x_{1} and x2subscript𝑥2x_{2}, though the endpoints of these trajectories will generally no longer coincide with the original images. We use this approach in Figure 4.
items.zh: 还可以混合两幅图像 x1 和 x2 以获得变化（图 4），遍历 CLIP 嵌入空间中它们之间的所有概念。为此，我们使用球面插值在它们的 CLIP 嵌入 z_i1 和 z_i2 之间旋转，当 θ 从 0 变化到 1 时，得到中间 CLIP 表示 z_iθ = slerp(z_i1, z_i2, θ)。沿轨迹生成中间 DDIM 潜在变量有两种选择。第一种选择涉及插值它们的 DDIM 逆推潜在变量 x_T1 和 x_T2（通过设置 x_Tθ = slerp(x_T1, x_T2, θ)），这产生一条端点重建 x1 和 x2 的单一轨迹。第二种选择涉及将 DDIM 潜在变量固定为随机采样值，用于轨迹中的所有插值点。这导致 x1 和 x2 之间有无穷多条轨迹，尽管这些轨迹的端点通常不再与原始图像重合。我们在图 4 中使用了这种方法。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Text diffs applied to images by interpolating between their CLIP image embeddings and a normalised difference of the CLIP text embeddings produced from the two descriptions. We also perform DDIM inversion to perfectly reconstruct the input image in the first column, and fix the decoder DDIM noise across each row.
items.capZh: 图 5：通过插值图像的 CLIP 图像嵌入与两个描述生成的 CLIP 文本嵌入的归一化差异，将文本差异应用于图像。我们还执行 DDIM 逆推以完美重建第一列中的输入图像，并固定每行的解码器 DDIM 噪声。

items.en: A key advantage of using CLIP compared to other models for image representations is that it embeds images and text to the same latent space, thus allowing us to apply language-guided image manipulations (i.e., text diffs), which we show in Figure 5. To modify the image to reflect a new text description y𝑦y, we first obtain its CLIP text embedding ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}, as well as the CLIP text embedding zt0subscript𝑧subscript𝑡0z_{t_{0}} of a caption describing the current image333Instead of a description of the current image, we also experimented with using a dummy caption like “a photo” for the baseline, or removing it altogether. These also worked well.. We then compute a text diff vector zd=norm​(zt−zt0)subscript𝑧𝑑normsubscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑧subscript𝑡0z_{d}=\text{norm}(z_{t}-z_{t_{0}}) from these by taking their difference and normalizing. Now, we can rotate between the image CLIP embedding zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} and the text diff vector zdsubscript𝑧𝑑z_{d} using spherical interpolation, yielding intermediate CLIP representations zθ=slerp​(zi,zd,θ)subscript𝑧𝜃slerpsubscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑧𝑑𝜃z_{\theta}=\text{slerp}(z_{i},z_{d},\theta), where θ𝜃\theta is increased linearly from 0 to a maximum value that is typically in [0.25,0.50]0.250.50[0.25,0.50]. We produce the final outputs by decoding the interpolates zθsubscript𝑧𝜃z_{\theta}, fixing the base DDIM noise to xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} throughout the entire trajectory.
items.zh: 与用于图像表示的其他模型相比，使用 CLIP 的一个关键优势是它将图像和文本嵌入到相同的潜在空间，从而允许我们应用语言引导的图像操作（即文本差异），如图 5 所示。为了修改图像以反映新的文本描述 y，我们首先获得其 CLIP 文本嵌入 z_t，以及描述当前图像的描述的 CLIP 文本嵌入 z_t0。然后，我们通过计算它们的差异并归一化，得到文本差异向量 z_d = norm(z_t - z_t0)。现在，我们可以使用球面插值在图像 CLIP 嵌入 z_i 和文本差异向量 z_d 之间旋转，得到中间 CLIP 表示 z_θ = slerp(z_i, z_d, θ)，其中 θ 从 0 线性增加到通常在 [0.25, 0.50] 之间的最大值。我们通过解码插值点 z_θ 生成最终输出，在整个轨迹中固定基础 DDIM 噪声为 x_T。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Variations of images featuring typographic attacks Goh et al. (2021) paired with the CLIP model’s predicted probabilities across three labels. Surprisingly, the decoder still recovers Granny Smith apples even when the predicted probability for this label is near 0%. We also find that our CLIP model is slightly less susceptible to the “pizza” attack than the models investigated in Goh et al. (2021).
items.capZh: 图 6：带有排版攻击 (Goh et al., 2021) 的图像变体，以及 CLIP 模型对三个标签的预测概率。令人惊讶的是，即使“Granny Smith”标签的预测概率接近 0%，解码器仍然恢复出 Granny Smith 苹果。我们还发现，我们的 CLIP 模型对“披萨”攻击的敏感性略低于 Goh 等人 (2021) 研究的模型。

items.en: Our decoder model provides a unique opportunity to explore CLIP latent space by allowing us to directly visualize what the CLIP image encoder is seeing. As an example use case, we can revisit cases where CLIP makes incorrect predictions, such as typographic attacks Goh et al. (2021). In these adversarial images, a piece of text is overlayed on top of an object, which causes CLIP to predict the object described by the text rather than the object depicted in the image. This piece of text essentially hides the original object in terms of output probabilities. In Figure 6, we show an example of this attack from Goh et al. (2021), wherein an apple can be misclassified as an iPod. Surprisingly, we find that our decoder still generates pictures of apples with high probability even though the predicted probability of “Granny Smith” is near zero. Even more notable, the model never produces pictures of iPods, despite the very high relative predicted probability of this caption.
items.zh: 我们的解码器模型提供了一个独特的机会来探索 CLIP 潜在空间，允许我们直接可视化 CLIP 图像编码器看到的内容。作为一个示例用例，我们可以重新审视 CLIP 做出错误预测的情况，例如排版攻击 (Goh et al., 2021)。在这些对抗性图像中，一段文本覆盖在物体上，导致 CLIP 预测文本描述的物体而不是图像中描绘的物体。这段文本在输出概率上基本上隐藏了原始物体。在图 6 中，我们展示了 Goh 等人 (2021) 的这种攻击的一个例子，其中苹果可能被错误分类为 iPod。令人惊讶的是，我们发现即使“Granny Smith”的预测概率接近零，我们的解码器仍然以高概率生成苹果图片。更值得注意的是，尽管“iPod”描述的相对预测概率很高，但模型从未生成 iPod 图片。

items.en: PCA reconstructions offer another tool for probing the structure of the CLIP latent space. In Figure 7, we take the CLIP image embeddings of a handful of source images and reconstruct them with progressively more PCA dimensions, and then visualize the reconstructed image embeddings using our decoder with DDIM on a fixed seed. This allows us to see what semantic information the different dimensions encode. We observe that the early PCA dimensions preserve coarse-grained semantic information such as what types of objects are in the scene, whereas the later PCA dimensions encode finer-grained detail such as the shapes and exact form of the objects. For example, in the first scene, the earlier dimensions seem to encode that there is food and perhaps a container present, whereas the later dimensions encode tomatoes and a bottle specifically. Figure 7 also serves as a visualization of what the AR prior is modeling, since the AR prior is trained to explicitly predict these principal components in this order.
items.zh: PCA 重建提供了另一种探测 CLIP 潜在空间结构的工具。在图 7 中，我们取少量源图像的 CLIP 图像嵌入，并用逐渐增多的 PCA 维度重建它们，然后使用我们的解码器在固定种子上用 DDIM 可视化重建的图像嵌入。这使我们能够看到不同维度编码了什么语义信息。我们观察到，早期的 PCA 维度保留了粗粒度的语义信息，例如场景中物体的类型，而较晚的 PCA 维度编码了更细粒度的细节，例如物体的形状和精确形式。例如，在第一个场景中，较早的维度似乎编码了存在食物和可能的容器，而较晚的维度具体编码了西红柿和瓶子。图 7 也作为自回归先验建模内容的可视化，因为自回归先验被训练为按此顺序显式预测这些主成分。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Visualization of reconstructions of CLIP latents from progressively more PCA dimensions (20, 30, 40, 80, 120, 160, 200, 320 dimensions), with the original source image on the far right. The lower dimensions preserve coarse-grained semantic information, whereas the higher dimensions encode finer-grained details about the exact form of the objects in the scene.
items.capZh: 图 7：从逐渐增多的 PCA 维度（20、30、40、80、120、160、200、320 维）重建 CLIP 潜在变量的可视化，最右边是原始源图像。较低的维度保留粗粒度的语义信息，而较高的维度编码关于场景中物体精确形式的更细粒度细节。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Samples using different conditioning signals for the same decoder. In the first row, we pass the text caption to the decoder, and pass a zero vector for the CLIP embedding. In the second row, we pass both the text caption and the CLIP text embedding of the caption. In the third row, we pass the text and a CLIP image embedding generated by an autoregressive prior for the given caption. Note that this decoder is only trained to do the text-to-image generation task (without the CLIP image representation) 5% of the time.
items.capZh: 图 8：对同一解码器使用不同条件信号的样本。在第一行中，我们将文本描述传递给解码器，并将 CLIP 嵌入传递为零向量。在第二行中，我们同时传递文本描述和描述的 CLIP 文本嵌入。在第三行中，我们传递文本和由自回归先验为给定描述生成的 CLIP 图像嵌入。请注意，该解码器仅在 5% 的时间内训练用于执行文本到图像生成任务（没有 CLIP 图像表示）。

items.en: Although we train a prior to generate CLIP image embeddings from captions, the prior is not strictly necessary for caption-to-image generation. For instance, our decoder can condition on both CLIP image embeddings and captions, but the CLIP image embedding is dropped 5% of the time during training in order to enable classifier-free guidance. Therefore, at sampling time, we can condition on only the caption, although this underperforms a model trained fully in this way (this model is GLIDE, and we do a thorough comparison with GLIDE in Sections 5.2 and 5.3). Another possibility is to feed the decoder the CLIP text embedding as if it were an image embedding, as previously observed Zhou et al. (2021); Wang et al. (2022). The first two rows of Figure 8 depicts samples obtained in these two ways; the third row depicts samples obtained with a prior. Conditioning the decoder on just the caption is clearly worst, but conditioning on text embeddings zero-shot does produce reasonable results. Building on this observation, another approach would be to train the decoder to condition on CLIP text embeddings Crowson (2021d) instead of CLIP image embeddings (although we would lose the capabilities mentioned in Section 4).
items.zh: 尽管我们训练了一个先验来从描述生成 CLIP 图像嵌入，但先验对于描述到图像的生成并非严格必要。例如，我们的解码器可以同时以 CLIP 图像嵌入和描述为条件，但在训练期间，CLIP 图像嵌入有 5% 的时间被丢弃，以实现无分类器引导。因此，在采样时，我们可以仅以描述为条件，尽管这不如完全以这种方式训练的模型（该模型是 GLIDE，我们在第 5.2 和 5.3 节中与 GLIDE 进行了彻底比较）。另一种可能性是将 CLIP 文本嵌入作为图像嵌入输入解码器，如先前观察到的 (Zhou et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2022)。图 8 的前两行展示了以这两种方式获得的样本；第三行展示了使用先验获得的样本。仅以描述为条件显然最差，但零样本以文本嵌入为条件确实产生了合理的结果。基于这一观察，另一种方法是训练解码器以 CLIP 文本嵌入 (Crowson, 2021d) 为条件，而不是 CLIP 图像嵌入（尽管我们会失去第 4 节中提到的能力）。

items.en: To quantify the effectiveness of these alternate approaches, we train two models: a small decoder conditioned on CLIP text embeddings, and a small unCLIP stack (diffusion prior and decoder). We then compare samples from the text-embedding decoder, samples from the unCLIP stack, and samples obtained from feeding text embeddings to the unCLIP decoder zero-shot, sweeping across guidance scales for all models. We find that these approaches respectively score FIDs of 9.16, 7.99, and 16.55 on a test set, suggesting the unCLIP approach is best. We also run human evaluations comparing the first two settings, sweeping over sampling hyperparameters for each using our human evaluation proxy model (Appendix A). We find that humans prefer the full unCLIP stack 57.0% ±plus-or-minus\pm 3.1% of the time for photorealism and 53.1% ±plus-or-minus\pm 3.1% of the time for caption similarity.
items.zh: 为了量化这些替代方法的有效性，我们训练了两个模型：一个以 CLIP 文本嵌入为条件的小型解码器，以及一个小型 unCLIP 堆栈（扩散先验和解码器）。然后，我们比较文本嵌入解码器的样本、unCLIP 堆栈的样本以及零样本将文本嵌入输入 unCLIP 解码器获得的样本，对所有模型扫描引导尺度。我们发现这些方法在测试集上的 FID 分别为 9.16、7.99 和 16.55，表明 unCLIP 方法最佳。我们还进行了人工评估，比较前两种设置，使用我们的人工评估代理模型（附录 A）扫描每种设置的采样超参数。我们发现，人类在照片真实感方面偏好完整 unCLIP 堆栈的比例为 57.0% ± 3.1%，在描述相似性方面为 53.1% ± 3.1%。

items.en: Given the importance of the prior, it is worth evaluating different approaches for training it. We compare both the AR and diffusion priors throughout our experiments. In all cases (Sections 5.2, 5.4, and 5.5), we find that the diffusion prior outperforms the AR prior for comparable model size and reduced training compute.
items.zh: 鉴于先验的重要性，评估训练先验的不同方法是值得的。我们在整个实验中比较了自回归先验和扩散先验。在所有情况下（第 5.2、5.4 和 5.5 节），我们发现扩散先验在相当的模型大小和减少的训练算力下优于自回归先验。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Samples when increasing guidance scale for both unCLIP and GLIDE, using the prompt, “A green vase filled with red roses sitting on top of table.” For unCLIP, we fix the latent vectors sampled from the prior, and only vary the guidance scale of the decoder. For both models, we fix the diffusion noise seed for each column. Samples from unCLIP improve in quality (more realistic lighting and shadows) but do not change in content as we increase guidance scale, preserving semantic diversity even at high decoder guidance scales.
items.capZh: 图 9：使用提示“一个装满红玫瑰的绿色花瓶放在桌子上”时，增加引导尺度对 unCLIP 和 GLIDE 的样本影响。对于 unCLIP，我们固定从先验采样的潜在向量，仅改变解码器的引导尺度。对于两个模型，我们固定每列的扩散噪声种子。随着引导尺度增加，unCLIP 的样本质量提高（更逼真的光照和阴影），但内容不变，即使在高的解码器引导尺度下也保留了语义多样性。

items.en: We observe in Figure 1 that unCLIP is capable of synthesizing complex, realistic images. While we can compare sample quality to past models using FID, it is not always aligned with human judgment. To better gauge the generation capabilities of our system, we conduct systematic human evaluations comparing unCLIP to GLIDE for photorealism, caption similarity, and sample diversity.
items.zh: 我们在图 1 中观察到 unCLIP 能够合成复杂、逼真的图像。虽然我们可以使用 FID 将样本质量与过去的模型进行比较，但它并不总是与人类判断一致。为了更好地评估我们系统的生成能力，我们进行了系统的人工评估，比较 unCLIP 和 GLIDE 在照片真实感、描述相似性和样本多样性方面的表现。

items.en: We follow the protocol of Ramesh et al.; Nichol et al. [40; 35] for the first two evaluations: for photorealism, users are presented with pairs of images and must choose which looks more photorealistic; for caption similarity, users are additionally prompted with a caption, and must choose which image better matches the caption. In both evaluations, there is a third “Not sure” option. For diversity, we propose a new evaluation protocol in which humans are presented with two 4×4444\times 4 grids of samples and must choose which is more diverse (with a third option, “Not sure”). For this evaluation, we produce sample grids using 1,000 captions from the MS-COCO validation set, and always compare sample grids for the same caption. Before running human comparisons, we swept over sampling hyperparameters for each model using a CLIP linear probe trained to be a proxy for human photorealism evaluations (Appendix A). These hyperparameters are fixed across all three types of evaluation.
items.zh: 我们遵循 Ramesh 等人和 Nichol 等人 [40; 35] 的协议进行前两项评估：对于照片真实感，用户看到成对的图像，必须选择哪一张看起来更逼真；对于描述相似性，用户还会看到描述，必须选择哪一张图像更符合描述。在这两项评估中，还有一个“不确定”选项。对于多样性，我们提出了一种新的评估协议，其中人类看到两个 4×4 的样本网格，必须选择哪一个更多样（还有一个“不确定”选项）。在此评估中，我们使用 MS-COCO 验证集中的 1000 个描述生成样本网格，并且总是比较相同描述的样本网格。在进行人工比较之前，我们使用一个经过训练的 CLIP 线性探针作为人类照片真实感评估的代理（附录 A），为每个模型扫描采样超参数。这些超参数在所有三种评估中固定。

items.en: We present our results in Table 1. In general, the diffusion prior performs better than the AR prior in pairwise comparisons against GLIDE. We find that humans still slightly prefer GLIDE to unCLIP in terms of photorealism, but the gap is very small. Even with similar photorealism, unCLIP is strongly preferred over GLIDE in terms of diversity, highlighting one of its benefits.
items.zh: 我们在表1中展示了结果。总体而言，在成对比较中，扩散先验在对抗GLIDE时表现优于自回归先验。我们发现，在逼真度方面，人类仍然略微偏好GLIDE而非unCLIP，但差距非常小。即使逼真度相似，unCLIP在多样性方面也明显优于GLIDE，这凸显了其优势之一。

full.secZh: 5.3 通过引导改进多样性-保真度权衡

items.capEn: Figure 10: When comparing unCLIP (with our best sampling settings) to various settings of guidance scale for GLIDE, unCLIP was preferred by human evaluators on at least one axis among photorealism, caption similarity, and diversity for each comparison. At the higher guidance scales used to generate photorealistic images, unCLIP yields greater diversity for comparable photorealism and caption similarity.
items.capZh: 图10：当将unCLIP（使用我们最佳采样设置）与GLIDE的各种引导尺度设置进行比较时，在每次比较中，人类评估者在逼真度、标题相似性和多样性中至少一个维度上偏好unCLIP。在用于生成逼真图像的较高引导尺度下，unCLIP在相似的逼真度和标题相似性下产生了更大的多样性。

items.capEn: Figure 11: FID versus guidance scale for unCLIP and GLIDE. For the unCLIP priors, we swept over sampling hyperparameters and fixed to the settings with the best minimum FID.
items.capZh: 图11：unCLIP和GLIDE的FID与引导尺度的关系。对于unCLIP先验，我们遍历了采样超参数，并固定为最佳最小FID的设置。

items.en: Compared to GLIDE, we qualitatively observe that unCLIP is able to generate more diverse images while leveraging the guidance technique to improve sample quality. To understand why, consider Figure 9 where we increase guidance scale for both GLIDE and unCLIP. For GLIDE, the semantics (camera angle, color, size) converge as we increase guidance scale, whereas for unCLIP the semantic information of the scene is frozen in the CLIP image embedding and therefore does not collapse when guiding the decoder.
items.zh: 与GLIDE相比，我们定性观察到unCLIP能够生成更多样化的图像，同时利用引导技术提高样本质量。为了理解原因，考虑图9，我们增加了GLIDE和unCLIP的引导尺度。对于GLIDE，随着引导尺度的增加，语义（相机角度、颜色、大小）趋于收敛，而对于unCLIP，场景的语义信息被冻结在CLIP图像嵌入中，因此在引导解码器时不会崩溃。

items.en: In Section 5.2, we observed that unCLIP achieves similar photorealism as GLIDE while maintaining more diversity, but that its caption matching capabilities were slightly worse. It is natural to ask whether GLIDE’s guidance scale can be lowered to obtain the same diversity level as unCLIP while maintaining better caption matching. In Figure 10, we conduct a more careful study of this question by performing human evaluations across several GLIDE guidance scales. We find that GLIDE at guidance scale 2.0 is very close to the photorealism and caption similarity of unCLIP, while still producing less diverse samples.
items.zh: 在第5.2节中，我们观察到unCLIP在保持更高多样性的同时实现了与GLIDE相似的逼真度，但其标题匹配能力稍差。自然要问，是否可以降低GLIDE的引导尺度以获得与unCLIP相同的多样性水平，同时保持更好的标题匹配。在图10中，我们通过在不同GLIDE引导尺度下进行人类评估，更仔细地研究了这个问题。我们发现，引导尺度为2.0的GLIDE在逼真度和标题相似性上与unCLIP非常接近，同时仍然产生多样性较低的样本。

items.en: Finally, in Figure 11 we compute MS-COCO zero-shot FID Heusel et al. (2017) while sweeping over guidance scale for both unCLIP and GLIDE, finding that guidance hurts the FID of unCLIP much less so than for GLIDE. In this evaluation, we fix the guidance scale of the unCLIP prior and only vary the guidance scale of the decoder. This is another indication that guidance hurts the diversity of GLIDE much more than unCLIP, since FID heavily penalizes non-diverse generations.
items.zh: 最后，在图11中，我们计算了MS-COCO零样本FID Heusel et al. (2017)，同时遍历unCLIP和GLIDE的引导尺度，发现引导对unCLIP的FID损害远小于GLIDE。在此评估中，我们固定unCLIP先验的引导尺度，仅改变解码器的引导尺度。这再次表明引导对GLIDE多样性的损害远大于unCLIP，因为FID严重惩罚非多样性的生成。

items.en: In the text-conditional image generation literature, it has become standard practice to evaluate FID on the MS-COCO Lin et al. (2014) validation set. We present results on this benchmark in Table 2. Like GLIDE and DALL-E, unCLIP is not directly trained on the MS-COCO training set, but can still generalize to the validation set zero-shot. We find that, compared to these other zero-shot models, unCLIP achieves a new state-of-the-art FID of 10.39 when sampling with the diffusion prior. In Figure 12, we visually compare unCLIP to various recent text-conditional image generation models on several captions from MS-COCO. We find that, like the other methods, unCLIP produces realistic scenes that capture the text prompts.
items.zh: 在文本条件图像生成文献中，在MS-COCO Lin et al. (2014)验证集上评估FID已成为标准做法。我们在表2中展示了该基准测试的结果。与GLIDE和DALL-E一样，unCLIP并未直接在MS-COCO训练集上训练，但仍能零样本泛化到验证集。我们发现，与其他零样本模型相比，unCLIP在使用扩散先验采样时达到了新的最先进FID 10.39。在图12中，我们将unCLIP与近期几种文本条件图像生成模型在MS-COCO的多个标题上进行了视觉比较。我们发现，与其他方法一样，unCLIP生成了捕捉文本提示的逼真场景。

items.en: We additionally perform automated aesthetic quality evaluations comparing unCLIP to GLIDE. Our goal with this evaluation is to assess how well each model produces artistic illustrations and photographs. To this end, we generated 512 “artistic” captions using GPT-3 Brown et al. (2020) by prompting it with captions for existing artwork (both real and AI generated). Next, we trained a CLIP linear probe to predict human aesthetic judgments using the AVA dataset Murray et al. (2012) (Appendix A). For each model and set of sampling hyperparameters, we produce four images for each prompt, and report the mean predicted aesthetic judgment over the full batch of 2048 images.
items.zh: 我们还进行了自动美学质量评估，比较unCLIP和GLIDE。此评估的目标是评估每个模型生成艺术插图和照片的能力。为此，我们使用GPT-3 Brown et al. (2020)生成了512个“艺术”标题，通过提示其现有艺术作品（包括真实和AI生成的）的标题。接下来，我们训练了一个CLIP线性探针，使用AVA数据集Murray et al. (2012)预测人类审美判断（附录A）。对于每个模型和采样超参数集，我们为每个提示生成四张图像，并报告整个2048张图像批次上的平均预测审美判断。

items.en: In Figure 13, we present results on our aesthetic quality evaluation. We find that guidance improves aesthetic quality for both GLIDE and unCLIP. For unCLIP, we only guide the decoder (we found that guiding the prior hurt results). We also plot the aesthetic quality against Recall444Recall is computed with respect to the training dataset. , since guidance typically induces a trade-off
items.zh: 在图13中，我们展示了美学质量评估的结果。我们发现，引导提高了GLIDE和unCLIP的美学质量。对于unCLIP，我们仅引导解码器（我们发现引导先验会损害结果）。我们还绘制了美学质量与召回率444召回率是针对训练数据集计算的。的关系，因为引导通常会在保真度和多样性之间引入权衡。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Random image samples on MS-COCO prompts.
items.capZh: 图12：MS-COCO提示上的随机图像样本。

items.en: between fidelity and diversity. Interestingly, we find that guiding unCLIP does not decrease Recall while still improving aesthetic quality according to this metric.
items.zh: 有趣的是，我们发现引导unCLIP不会降低召回率，同时根据该指标仍能提高美学质量。

items.en: Synthetic image generation is a well studied problem, and most popular techniques for unconditional image generation have also been applied to the text-conditional setting. Many previous works have trained GANs Goodfellow et al. (2014) on publicly available image captioning datasets to produce text-conditional image samples Xu et al. (2017); Zhu et al. (2019); Tao et al. (2020); Zhang et al. (2021a); Ye et al. (2021). Other works have adapted the VQ-VAE approach van den Oord et al. (2017) to text-conditional image generation by training autoregressive transformers on sequences of text tokens followed by image tokens Ramesh et al. (2021); Ding et al. (2021); Aghajanyan et al. (2022). Finally, some works have applied diffusion models to the problem, training either continuous Nichol et al. (2021) or discrete Gu et al. (2021) diffusion models with auxiliary text encoders to handle textual input.
items.zh: 合成图像生成是一个研究充分的问题，大多数用于无条件图像生成的流行技术也已应用于文本条件设置。许多先前的工作在公开可用的图像标题数据集上训练了GANs Goodfellow et al. (2014)，以生成文本条件图像样本Xu et al. (2017); Zhu et al. (2019); Tao et al. (2020); Zhang et al. (2021a); Ye et al. (2021)。其他工作将VQ-VAE方法van den Oord et al. (2017)应用于文本条件图像生成，通过训练自回归Transformer处理文本标记序列后接图像标记Ramesh et al. (2021); Ding et al. (2021); Aghajanyan et al. (2022)。最后，一些工作将扩散模型应用于该问题，训练连续Nichol et al. (2021)或离散Gu et al. (2021)扩散模型，并辅以文本编码器处理文本输入。

items.en: Previous works have leveraged hierarchical generative processes to create high-quality synthetic images. Razavi et al. [41] trains a multi-layer discrete autoencoder, allowing them to first sample coarse-grained latent codes and then use this as conditioning information when sampling higher-resolution latent codes. Child; Vahdat and Kautz [5; 50] generate images using VAEs with a hierarchy of latent codes that increase progressively with resolution. Concurrently with our work, Gafni et al. [17] conditions a generative image model on segmentation masks, allowing for a generative process that first samples a semantic map of an image and then conditions the generated image on this information.
items.zh: 先前的工作利用层次化生成过程来创建高质量的合成图像。Razavi et al. [41]训练了一个多层离散自编码器，允许他们首先采样粗粒度的潜在编码，然后在采样更高分辨率的潜在编码时将其作为条件信息。Child; Vahdat and Kautz [5; 50]使用具有层次化潜在编码的VAE生成图像，这些潜在编码随分辨率逐步增加。与我们工作同时，Gafni et al. [17]将生成图像模型条件于分割掩码，允许生成过程首先采样图像的语义图，然后根据此信息条件生成图像。

items.en: The computational benefits of using diffusion to model a latent space has been noted by previous works. Preechakul et al. [38] propose an autoencoder framework where diffusion models are used to render latent variables as images, and a second diffusion model is used to generate these latents (similar to our diffusion prior). Vahdat et al. [51] use a score-based model for the latent space of a VAE, while Rombach et al. [42] use diffusion models on the latents obtained from a VQGAN Esser et al. (2020) like autoencoder.
items.zh: 使用扩散模型对潜在空间建模的计算优势已被先前的工作注意到。Preechakul et al. [38]提出了一种自编码器框架，其中扩散模型用于将潜在变量渲染为图像，而第二个扩散模型用于生成这些潜在变量（类似于我们的扩散先验）。Vahdat et al. [51]使用基于分数的模型处理VAE的潜在空间，而Rombach et al. [42]对从VQGAN Esser et al. (2020)类自编码器获得的潜在变量使用扩散模型。

items.en: Since its release, CLIP Radford et al. (2021) has been used extensively to steer generative image models towards text prompts. Galatolo et al.; Patashnik et al.; Murdock; Gal et al. [19; 36; 32; 18] guide GANs using gradients from a CLIP model. For diffusion models, Dhariwal and Nichol [11] introduced classifier guidance as a way to use gradients from a classifier trained on noised images to steer the model towards higher quality generations. Nichol et al. [35] train a CLIP model on noised images and guide a text-conditional diffusion model, while Crowson; Crowson [7; 8] use an unnoised CLIP model to guide unconditional or class-conditional diffusion models. Ho and Salimans [24] introduced classifier-free guidance and showed that one can perform guidance implictly from the predictions of the model with and without the conditioning information, thus removing the need for a classifier. Nichol et al. [35] showed classifier-free guidance works more favorably than CLIP guidance for text conditional image generation.
items.zh: 自发布以来，CLIP Radford et al. (2021)已被广泛用于引导生成图像模型朝向文本提示。Galatolo et al.; Patashnik et al.; Murdock; Gal et al. [19; 36; 32; 18]使用来自CLIP模型的梯度引导GAN。对于扩散模型，Dhariwal and Nichol [11]引入了分类器引导，作为使用在噪声图像上训练的分类器的梯度来引导模型生成更高质量样本的方法。Nichol et al. [35]在噪声图像上训练CLIP模型并引导文本条件扩散模型，而Crowson; Crowson [7; 8]使用无噪声的CLIP模型引导无条件或类条件扩散模型。Ho and Salimans [24]引入了无分类器引导，并表明可以通过模型在有和没有条件信息时的预测隐式执行引导，从而消除了对分类器的需求。Nichol et al. [35]表明，对于文本条件图像生成，无分类器引导比CLIP引导效果更好。

items.en: Several previous works have trained generative image models that are directly conditioned on CLIP embeddings. Zhou et al. [61] condition GAN models on randomly perturbed CLIP image embeddings, finding that these models can generalize to CLIP text embeddings to produce text-conditional images. Crowson [9] trained diffusion models conditioned on CLIP text embeddings, allowing for direct text-conditional image generation. Wang et al. [54] train an autoregressive generative model conditioned on CLIP image embeddings, finding that it generalizes to CLIP text embeddings well enough to allow for text-conditional image synthesis.
items.zh: 有几项先前的工作训练了直接条件于CLIP嵌入的生成图像模型。Zhou et al. [61]将GAN模型条件于随机扰动的CLIP图像嵌入，发现这些模型可以泛化到CLIP文本嵌入以生成文本条件图像。Crowson [9]训练了条件于CLIP文本嵌入的扩散模型，允许直接进行文本条件图像生成。Wang et al. [54]训练了一个条件于CLIP图像嵌入的自回归生成模型，发现它能够很好地泛化到CLIP文本嵌入，足以进行文本条件图像合成。

items.en: Bordes et al. [3] train diffusion models conditioned on image representations from contrastive models. While the diffusion models themselves cannot generate images unconditionally, the authors experimented with a simple approach for two-stage image generation by employing Kernel Density Estimation to sample image representations. By feeding these generated representations to the diffusion model, they can generate images end-to-end in a way similar to our proposed technique. However, our work differs from this in two ways: first, we use multimodal contrastive representations rather than image-only representations; second, we employ much more powerful generative models for the first stage of the generation hierarchy, and these generative models are conditioned on text.
items.zh: Bordes et al. [3]训练了条件于对比模型图像表示的扩散模型。虽然扩散模型本身无法无条件生成图像，但作者尝试了一种简单的两阶段图像生成方法，使用核密度估计来采样图像表示。通过将这些生成的表示输入扩散模型，他们可以以类似于我们提出的技术的方式端到端生成图像。然而，我们的工作与此有两个不同：首先，我们使用多模态对比表示而非仅图像表示；其次，我们在生成层次的第一阶段使用了更强大的生成模型，并且这些生成模型是文本条件的。

items.capZh: （a）unCLIP
(b) GLIDE

items.capEn: Figure 15: Reconstructions from the decoder for difficult binding problems. We find that the reconstructions mix up objects and attributes. In the first two examples, the model mixes up the color of two objects. In the rightmost example, the model does not reliably reconstruct the relative size of two objects.
items.capZh: 图 15：解码器对困难绑定问题的重建结果。我们发现重建结果混淆了物体和属性。在前两个例子中，模型混淆了两个物体的颜色。在最右侧的例子中，模型未能可靠地重建两个物体的相对大小。

items.capEn: Figure 16: Samples from unCLIP for the prompt, “A sign that says deep learning.”
items.capZh: 图 16：unCLIP 对提示“A sign that says deep learning”的生成样本。

items.capEn: (a) A high quality photo of a dog playing in a green field next to a lake.
items.capZh: (a) 一张高质量照片，展示一只狗在湖边绿色草地上玩耍。

items.capEn: (b) A high quality photo of Times Square.
items.capZh: (b) 一张时代广场的高质量照片。

items.en: Although conditioning image generation on CLIP embeddings improves diversity, this choice does come with certain limitations. In particular, unCLIP is worse at binding attributes to objects than a corresponding GLIDE model. In Figure 14, we find that unCLIP struggles more than GLIDE with a prompt where it must bind two separate objects (cubes) to two separate attributes (colors). We hypothesize that this occurs because the CLIP embedding itself does not explicitly bind attributes to objects, and find that reconstructions from the decoder often mix up attributes and objects, as shown in Figure 15. A similar and likely related issue is that unCLIP struggles at producing coherent text, as illustrated in Figure 16; it is possible that the CLIP embedding does not precisely encode spelling information of rendered text. This issue is likely made worse because the BPE encoding we use obscures the spelling of the words in a caption from the model, so the model needs to have independently seen each token written out in the training images in order to learn to render it.
items.zh: 尽管基于 CLIP 嵌入的条件图像生成提高了多样性，但这种选择也带来了一定的局限性。特别是，unCLIP 在将属性绑定到物体上的能力不如相应的 GLIDE 模型。在图 14 中，我们发现 unCLIP 在处理需要将两个独立物体（立方体）绑定到两个独立属性（颜色）的提示时，比 GLIDE 更困难。我们推测这是因为 CLIP 嵌入本身并未明确将属性绑定到物体，并且发现解码器的重建结果经常混淆属性和物体，如图 15 所示。一个类似且可能相关的问题是，unCLIP 在生成连贯文本方面存在困难，如图 16 所示；可能是 CLIP 嵌入未能精确编码渲染文本的拼写信息。这个问题可能因我们使用的 BPE 编码而加剧，该编码掩盖了标题中单词的拼写，因此模型需要独立地在训练图像中看到每个 token 的书写形式，才能学会渲染它。

items.en: We also note that our stack still has a hard time producing details in complex scenes (Figure 17). We hypothesize that this is a limitation of our decoder hierarchy producing an image at a base resolution of 64×64646464\times 64 and then upsampling it. Training our unCLIP decoder at a higher base resolution should be able to alleviate this, at the cost of additional training and inference compute.
items.zh: 我们还注意到，我们的堆叠结构在处理复杂场景的细节方面仍然存在困难（图 17）。我们推测这是解码器层级结构的一个限制，它以 64×64 的基础分辨率生成图像，然后进行上采样。在更高的基础分辨率上训练我们的 unCLIP 解码器应该能够缓解这一问题，但代价是增加训练和推理算力。

items.en: As discussed in the GLIDE paper, image generation models carry risks related to deceptive and otherwise harmful content. unCLIP’s performance improvements also raise the risk profile over GLIDE. As the technology matures, it leaves fewer traces and indicators that outputs are AI-generated, making it easier to mistake generated images for authentic ones and vice versa. More research is also needed on how the change in architecture changes how the model learns biases in training data.
items.zh: 正如 GLIDE 论文中所讨论的，图像生成模型存在与欺骗性和其他有害内容相关的风险。unCLIP 的性能提升也增加了相对于 GLIDE 的风险。随着技术的成熟，它留下的痕迹和指示 AI 生成的迹象越来越少，使得生成的图像更容易被误认为是真实的，反之亦然。还需要更多研究来了解架构变化如何改变模型学习训练数据中偏见的方式。

items.en: The risks of these models should be assessed in relation to the particular deployment context, which includes training data, guardrails in place, the deployment space, and who will have access. A preliminary analysis of these issues in the context of the DALL·E 2 Preview platform (the first deployment of an unCLIP model), can be found in Mishkin et al. [30].
items.zh: 这些模型的风险应根据具体的部署环境进行评估，包括训练数据、现有的防护措施、部署空间以及谁将拥有访问权限。在 DALL·E 2 预览平台（unCLIP 模型的首次部署）背景下对这些问题的初步分析，可参见 Mishkin 等人 [30]。

We’d also like to thank Yunxin Jiao for creating several figures used in the paper. We are grateful to the Acceleration and Supercomputing teams at OpenAI for their work on software and hardware infrastructure this project used.
items.zh: 我们要感谢 Jong Wook Kim、Hyeonwoo Noh、Alec Radford、Pranav Shyam 和 Ilya Sutskever 对我们工作的有益讨论和贡献。我们还要感谢 Yunxin Jiao 为论文创建了多张图表。我们感谢 OpenAI 的加速和超级计算团队在软件和硬件基础设施方面的工作，该项目使用了这些基础设施。
